scenarios.name: cue-anchored-beat-bar-lyric-star-lead
scenarios.intentGoal: Validate metadata-selected sequencing for Star with beat-by-beat pulse anchors, measure bar timing support, and vocal lyric cue timing.

scenarios.name: cue-anchored-phrase-star-lead
scenarios.intentGoal: Validate metadata-selected sequencing for Star with phrase release timing and melodic line cue anchors.

scenarios.name: section-cue-chorus-beat-bar-star-lead
scenarios.intentGoal: Validate metadata-selected sequencing for Star in Chorus 1 with beat-by-beat pulse anchors and measure bar timing support.

scenarios.name: preserve-existing-overlap-star-lead
scenarios.intentGoal: Validate metadata-selected sequencing for Star while preserving an existing overlapping effect already present in the sequence.

scenarios.name: preserve-existing-overlap-multi-target-star-snowflakes-lead
scenarios.intentGoal: Validate multi-target metadata-selected sequencing while preserving an existing overlapping Star effect and allowing additive layering on the seeded target.

scenarios.name: preserve-existing-overlap-section-chorus-star-lead
scenarios.intentGoal: Validate section-scoped metadata-selected sequencing in Chorus 1 while preserving an existing overlapping Star effect in the scoped section.

scenarios.name: replace-existing-overlap-star-lead
scenarios.intentGoal: Replace the existing overlapping Star look with a new lead color wash on the same layer.
